user.title: Eufy Privacy
user.description: Enter your Eufy credentials. The bridge add-on must already be running.

error.bridge_unreachable: Cannot reach the bridge add-on. Make sure it is installed and started.
error.bridge_token_invalid: The bridge rejected the token. Read /data/bridge_token from the add-on.
error.captcha_required: Eufy requires CAPTCHA: open the Eufy Security mobile app and sign in again to clear it.
error.two_factor_required: Eufy requires 2FA: complete the login from the mobile app and retry.

set_privacy_mode.name: Set Privacy Mode
set_privacy_mode.description: Enable or disable privacy mode on a camera.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: true = privacy on, false = privacy off.
